summary: Axesso exposes only HTTP REST APIs (Amazon, Walmart, Yahoo Finance, YouTube, Zillow, Home Depot, Kaufland, Otto, ASOS, Naver, Lidl, Zalando, plus account/dataset APIs) via its API portal at axesso.developer.azure-api.net, and access is authenticated by creating an Axesso API Portal account/signing in and then using the portal-issued API credentials/subscriptions for the chosen product.
